name: mT5
training_approach: self-supervised pretraining with span corruption on mC4 multilingual corpus covering 101 languages
lineage_path: McCulloch-Pitts neuron -> Perceptron -> MLP -> RNN -> LSTM -> Seq2Seq -> Transformer -> T5 -> mT5
summary: mT5 extended the T5 text-to-text framework to 101 languages by pretraining on the mC4 multilingual corpus, a filtered version of Common Crawl covering diverse languages. It demonstrated that the text-to-text paradigm scaled effectively across languages and enabled strong cross-lingual transfer, becoming a standard multilingual baseline for NLP research.
